relations.note: Declared background metadata enables the assembler to enforce the no-adjacent-dark-sections rule.
Declared consumed footnote symbols support assembly-time symbol assignment via placeholder tokens.
Reinforces self-containment specifically at locked-component boundaries.

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color
Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

rules.intent: Enable modular direct-stacking assembly where every section is fully self-contained.
rules.rule_text: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px (email.body.width = 600px) with its own top/bottom 32px padding (section.padding.vertical = 32px) and a declared background color; there are no margins outside the section — assembly is direct stacking.

quotes: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

rules.intent: Provide the assembler the metadata needed to compose and de-conflict sections.
rules.rule_text: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, which footnote symbols (†, ‡) it consumes (assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

quotes: Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

rules.intent: Prevent footnote-symbol collisions across independently-authored stacked sections.
rules.rule_text: Footnote symbols are superscript and assigned in order of appearance at assembly time; sections must use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

rules.intent: Keep sections self-contained so locked core components can be inserted without visual breakage.
rules.rule_text: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what is above or below (e.g., a wave meant to continue into the footer).

quotes: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

rules.intent: Preserve visual rhythm and contrast between stacked sections.
rules.rule_text: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections; this is the assembler's responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds.

quotes: All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.

rules.rule_text: All colors in code must be HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only for email client compatibility; and `bgcolor` attributes must be duplicated for Outlook.
